(404)PETITIONER APPEARED WITH COUNSEL. RESPONDENT APPEARED WITH COUNSEL. THIS MATTER CAME ON REGULARLY FOR HEARING THIS DAY OVER THE ISSUE OF WHERE THE CHILD WILL ATTE
ND SCHOOL. AT 2:00 P.M. THE PETITIONER WAS SWORN AND TESTIFIED ON HER OWN BEHALF. PETITIONER'S EXHIBIT #1, A BROCHURE FROM THE PRESENTATION SCHOOL,
ED ON HIS OWN BEHALF. RESPONDENT'S EXHIBIT #A, A PARENT TEACHER HANDBOOK, WAS MARKED FOR IDENTIFICATION AND ENTERED INTO EVIDENCE. AT 2:50 P.M. THE
